/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/Account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/AccountManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/Interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/Project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/ProjectManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/Task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/TaskForge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TaskForge.dir/UserValidator.cpp.o -o TaskForge
